sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69327" key="murmh/kion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυρμήκ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a species of spider, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:15:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.1</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
